'''Tantive IV''' {{Pronounced|ˈtæntɪˌvi 'fɔ:r}} was the fourth planet in the [[Tantive system/Legends|Tantive system]] of [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]].

The planet was home to the [[Tantive Gallery of Progressive Art]], the sister project to [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan's]] [[Aldera Museum of Modern Expression]]. At some point during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] decline, there was a cultural exchange of art and artist between the two worlds.

In honor of diplomats from Tantive IV who visited Alderaan, the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Star of Alderaan'']] was renamed ''Tantive IV''.

The planet was later in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] remnant territory ruled by [[Gaen Drommel]].
